title: santolina pectinata subsp. montiberica
intro: Santolina pectinata subsp. montiberica, also known as Spanish grey cotton or Santolina, is a shrubby perennial plant native to the Iberian Peninsula and other parts of the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Santolina pectinata subsp. montiberica include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and support respiratory health. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and infundibulums, and its essential oil is used in aromatherapy and skincare products.
